sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8204" key="a)ne/lkustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέλκυστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8204.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">incapable of being pulled,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὑπὸ φαντασίας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.40</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
